prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `3d588dc9`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 task package for `3d588dc9`. The rule is: find the 14-cell black wedge whose vertical span overlaps the gray `5` staircase the most, recolor the wedge edge facing that gray object to `6`, and erase the two-cell tail; everything else stays unchanged.

I treated the summary hints as partially discarded. They were useful on the wedge geometry, but they overgeneralized the selector to arbitrary colored objects; the stable anchor in the official family is the gray `5` staircase, which I documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3d588dc9/notes.md). No new shared primitive was needed.

The generator matches the family by building fixed `16x16` orange-background scenes with one gray staircase anchor, one target black wedge, an extra black wedge distractor, another colored staircase distractor, and sparse singleton noise. Official verification passed `3/3`, the build produced `1000` examples, generated-example verification passed `1000/1000`, and I visually checked the preview sheet.
